_description: WT-06 heuristic fixture: a clean static repo (no anti-fit signals from the oracle) but workers' file-touches overlap (e.g., they all need to edit the same shared interface file). Same-branch's real-time peer awareness is genuinely valuable here. The heuristic should emit verdict=neutral — don't recommend worktrees, don't warn against them, don't surface anything. Default same-branch proceeds.
expectedSurfaceText: (no surface — same-branch is the right call when file-touches overlap; peer-awareness during the shared-file edit is the value)
